title: Cannot enter a Website in Profile page

posts.author: iaroslav (Iaroslav Glodov)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I set the website in my Profile at the community.monday.com?
When I set my URL:

sprinterra.com
or
https://www.sprinterra.com/
or even
https://sprinterra.monday.com/

It shows me an error:

Website is invalid. Allowed domains are: https://views.monday.com

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @iaroslav, can you write in to support@monday.com about this? We’d love to help you there!

posts.author: iaroslav (Iaroslav Glodov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Talia!

Sorry, I cannot find where is website in my profile anymore.
Seems there is no such field anymore

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @iaroslav Thanks for getting back! Would you mind sending a screenshot of what you are seeing? I want to make sure I’m understanding correctly

posts.author: iaroslav (Iaroslav Glodov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Talia!
I could not find it again
So, No, I cannot send it to you.
